footer.tagline: Yacht catering delivery — Beaulieu-sur-mer • Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat • Villefranche-sur-Mer.

home.lead: Discreet, punctual and high-end service for your days at sea. Beaulieu-sur-mer, Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat & Villefranche-sur-Mer.
home.h2: A service designed for demanding clients.
home.h2sub: From breakfast to sunset aperitif: quality, simplicity, zero surprises.
home.b1d: We deliver to the dock at the agreed time. Clear communication, discreet execution.
home.b2d: Fresh products, vegetarian and alcohol-free options. Refined presentation.
home.b3d: Displayed prices include delivery — no extra fees.
home.partnerDesc: In collaboration with a selected boat rental partner.
home.partnerNote: External link — opens in a new tab.
home.step1: Choose your items from the menu.
home.step2: Enter the port + boat name + time slot.
home.cta2Desc: Express contact: fast reply, clear service.

menu.lead: Displayed prices are all-inclusive. No additional fees.
menu.disclaimer: Photos for illustration only. Allergens and details available on request.

zones.b1d: Time slots on request. Confirmation by message after validation.
zones.b2d: Dock + boat name + onboard contact for a smooth delivery.
zones.b3d: Prices include delivery. No surcharge added at checkout.
zones.weatherLegal: Weather data provided for information only.

gallery.lead: Add your photos here (platters, packaging, sea views).

faq.a1: Yes. Displayed prices are all-inclusive. No extra fees are added to the order.
faq.a2: After ordering, we confirm a time slot. We deliver to the dock with the boat name and an onboard contact.
faq.a3: Message us via the Contact page: we adapt within what is possible.

contact.lead: We reply quickly. Concise and efficient communication.
